“As I listened, it sounded like a reasonable explanation and I didn’t think more about it.  Sadly, my relationship with Anita ended some months later when she went off to college to pursue all of her dreams.  There was part of her that didn’t want to let go and there was part of me that wanted to chase after her but we both knew timing and fate was pushing us into different directions.  So now it’s maybe 2 years later.  One night I was sitting home alone watching TV.  I was flipping channels and I came across a cable talk show about sex.  The host had a sex therapist on discussing various issues and topics and they also had a call-in line.  They took a call from a man.  He said he and his wife were 28 years old and had been married for 4 years.  He went on to explain his wife had a problem with sex.  She didn’t like sex.  It was painful for her and she was emotionally and physically unable to have sex.  He then explained his wife was seeing a therapist to work on her problem.  At this point, the sex therapist applauded the caller for being so understanding with his wife’s problem and it was great she was seeing a therapist about her problem.  The sex therapist then asked if they’d learned anything from the therapy.  This is what the caller said and this is almost word for word.  The caller said yes, in therapy the wife had revealed when she was 11 years old her parents were divorced and her mom was sexually active.  Her mom would often bring home men and have sex with them in the bedroom next to hers.  She could hear her mother having sex and that experience has traumatized her and that’s why she has hang ups about sex and doesn’t like sex.”

 

“I was slouched on the couch watching this show and as I heard this I sat up and listened in amazement to the exact same story being told which I’d heard from Anita…and yet the same experience had given 2 outcomes which couldn’t be more opposite.  How could this be?  How do I reconcile this?  I pondered this for a long time.  My conclusion was people have a need to rationalize what they feel and what they want.  We see this every day.  People will go through life finding validation for what they want to believe.  So in this case, Anita’s a girl who was born with strong sexual desires.  When she was exposed at an early age to her mother enjoying sex this simply validated what she wanted to believe.  Anita concluded there was nothing wrong with her growing fascination with sex as she reached puberty.  As her sexual desires grew she felt they were healthy and there was no reason for guilt or repression.”

 

“On the other hand this caller’s wife was born a woman with no sexual desires.  She has no needs for sexual pleasure.  It’s the way she was born.  It’s in her DNA.  When the wife was exposed at an early age to her mother having sex she was repulsed by what she heard because that validated what she wanted to believe about sex.  She concluded from her childhood experience that sex is a dirty and disgusting thing which is wrong to do.  That fit what she wanted to believe.  Sex was something she didn’t want to do and now she had validation for believing that.”

 

“So this led to my theory that we’re all born with our propensity for sexual desires in place.  It’s in our DNA.  More importantly, it led to my understanding that different people can have vastly different sexual appetites…sexual desires…sexual needs.  Again, these can differ from can’t live without it to have no interest in it.  And this is something which men must understand.”

 

I was so fascinated by Michael’s stories and explanations that I was speechless for a time.  Finally, I asked, “Those stories were really that similar?”  Michael assured me they happened just as he told them.  He said he too had been speechless that night sitting on the sofa listening to an exact experience but an opposite outcome…And, what were the odds he’d flip channels that night and come across that show to listen to that caller.

 

Michael was now gathering his thoughts and continued.  “I had another revelation that night listening to the show.  The caller began describing his wife’s problem and the sex therapist on the show applauded the man for understanding his wife’s problem.  Then the caller told how his wife was seeking professional help for her problem.  I pictured the wife going to therapy for her problem and discussing her problem with the therapist.  As I sat there listening to all of this I thought, wait a minute!  The wife doesn’t have a problem.  This husband is the one with the problem.  He married someone who doesn’t like sex!  This poor wife was probably happy and content until everyone started telling her she had to like sex.  I imagined how it must be for this wife.  I imagined how low she must feel as everyone tells her she has this problem.  I imagined how guilty she must feel as she disappoints everyone…for simply being who she is.  Everyone’s telling her she has to enjoy doing something she has no interest in doing.”

“The more I thought about it I couldn’t help but reflect on how all of these highly educated therapists, these wizards of smart, are so locked into their templates of how people should be and their definition of normal that they’re piling guilt on this poor wife making her feel like she’s a disappointment to all of them.  I asked myself if perhaps it wouldn’t be better to simply accept her.  Everyone’s telling her she has a problem and trying to change her.  She doesn’t have a problem…She simply doesn’t like sex.  I don’t like sushi and I live happily without it.  I’d laugh at someone who tried to tell me that was a problem I needed to work on.  Her husband…Now he has a problem.  His problem is he married someone whose sexual desires are far below his.  And, why is he in this situation?  Because he made the assumption that everyone makes.  He assumed everyone likes sex as much as he does…or at least wants to like sex as much as he does.  And, when his assumption proved false what does he do?  Does he accept his wife as the person she is?  No, he tells her she has a problem and has to change to fit his template.  He fills her life with self-doubt and guilt.”

 

Once again Michael left me pondering the simple logic of his theory.  Finally, I said, “You know, going through life trying to change people to fit what you want them to be is a sure way to live with frustration and failure.  The real key here is the assumption the husband made.  He assumed everyone would, or should, be like he is.  He didn’t understand people are different.  He didn’t understand how his wife was…And now he’s paying for that.  This conversation is such an eye opener.  I think many of us go around looking for a mate and use the criteria of physical appearance and personality…And don’t address sexual compatibility like we should.  We assume that since we are compatible in everything else the sex will fall right into place.”  Now I thought for a moment on all the conventional wisdom on sex I’d heard over the years and asked, “Okay, let me be the devil’s advocate and repeat things I’ve heard over the years.  What about this one?  You often hear this or see it depicted in movies.  It’s the story of the sexually repressed woman who finally meets that special, amazing, tall, dark and handsome man who suddenly makes sex great for her.  It’s the story of the woman who wants sex but just hasn’t met the right guy yet.  Is this a myth?”

 

“I’d say within a woman’s level of sexual appetite there’ll be a range of enjoyment from different partners.  Say a woman enjoys sex.  With one man it may be good and with another man it may be better.  She could find a partner with whom everything’s perfect and her sexual pleasure becomes great.  But, do I think a woman doesn’t like sex just because she hasn’t met the right man?  No, I’m not buying that.  Do I think a woman who doesn’t like sex will meet the right man and undergo a transformation into a nymphomaniac?  No, it’s not going to happen.  If a girl likes sex then she’ll enjoy it no matter the partner.  Of course, some partners will be better than others and her enjoyment will increase.  On the other hand if a woman doesn’t like sex, then a different partner won’t change that.  Maybe she’ll find a partner who makes it less bad or less unpleasant for her…”

 

“…Let’s remember if you like sex you don’t even need a partner to enjoy it…And, that especially goes for women…Hell, they have the best toys and methods to enjoy sex solo.”

 

I could tell Michael was collecting his thoughts and then he said, “Let’s be clear about an important aspect of my theory.  I didn’t come to this conclusion to hate women who don’t like sex.  My goal was to understand women and their sexuality and without recognizing the vast differences in women and their sexual desires you’ll never understand it.  I love sex and have strong desires.  I have nothing against women who don’t like sex.  That’s just them, I accept it…And, I think I accept that far more than most men.  Everyone should be who they are.  Now, that having been said, I do have something against women who don’t like sex but won’t admit it to themselves or anyone else.  They want to think they are a sensual, sexy woman but when sex leaves them disappointed they blame the guy they’re with and the guy before that and probably the next guy.  They don’t have the guts to examine themselves and come to terms with their true sexuality.”

 

“And I’ve been there.  I had a girlfriend who never wanted sex and it was always because of something I didn’t do quite right or I wasn’t affectionate enough at the party or I’d looked at another girl at the restaurant.  In bed I never touched her in quite the right way so I ruined the mood.  She’d tell me she needed more foreplay so I’d give her a back massage.  Then she’d act like the massage had made her too sleepy to have sex.  There were two things I could count on from her.  One was she never wanted sex and the other was it was my fault.  It was like she expected me to be blessed with this perfect knowledge of her sexual intricacies.  Yet, when I didn’t have that knowledge she wasn’t willing to show me the secret.  Now, after this conversation, I understand that girl.  If I’d understood her then I would’ve broken it off early on instead of living with no sex and all the blame.”

 

Michael jumped in here.  “And I don’t think either one of us thinks we are the ultimate sex partner.  We both probably have a lot to learn.  The point is we’re eager to please and want to learn.  All we ask for is an enthusiastic and willing partner who’ll show us what they want us to do.”

 

There was a pause.  Michael took a deep breath and then said, “Okay, are you ready?  It gets even more complicated.  Not only do women differ in the level of their sexual desires, they also differ in what motivates those desires.  First, let’s use an example of two women who both love sex.  They both have a strong sexuality.  One of them may be like Anita who loved sex for the holding and touching and affection.  She craved the connection with her lover and felt the emotions of love during sex.  Afterwards, she enjoyed the warmth of being held by her lover.  Now let’s look at another woman who loves sex for the sex.  For her it’s all about the carnal experience.  She’s not looking for a loving connection with her partner as much as performance.  She wants it in certain ways and isn’t afraid to tell her partner how that is.  For her it’s less about love and more about lust.  These two girls have different motivations for loving sex but they both love sex.”

“Now here’s where men must watch out.  That previous example was of two women and why they loved sex.  Now we’re going to talk about women who have different motivations for having sex.  There’s a big difference.  In the first example both women had sex because they loved it…They loved it in slightly different ways but they both had sex because they loved it.  What if, and this is so common, a woman has sex…not because she enjoys sex…but because of some alternative motive.  To make it sound even worse we can say ulterior motive.”

 

“So let’s talk about girls whose motivation for sex isn’t necessarily sex.  These are the dangerous ones.  So what are these ulterior motives?  Well, one of the most obvious would be to get pregnant…with or without the man’s knowledge of what she’s doing.  Remember Dan and Myrna?  She was very motivated to have sex but her motive for doing so was to get pregnant in order to force Dan to marry her.  Myrna was consciously deceiving Dan.  It’s usually not deceptive though.  Often a woman is married and feels more sexual desire when they’re both trying to have a baby.  Her sexual desires may wane after she has her children.”

 

“Some women have sex to gain bargaining power.  They learn they can use sex to get things they want.  They can get those things by giving sex and by withholding sex.  Men who find themselves with these women are never going to have a healthy love life.  Everything is based on negotiations.  Who’d you rather be with…A girl like Anita or some trophy wife who’s withholding sex until she gets the new car she wants?”

 

“It sounds harsh to talk about sex and bargaining power in the same sentence but unfortunately that’s sometimes what it comes down to.  To best illustrate this we can make another comparison.  A girl like Anita sees sex as a give and receive.  She gives love and affection to her man and enjoys giving him pleasure.  She only wants to receive the same in return…And what could be healthier than that?  I think women like Anita will always have happy relationships.  But let’s look at another woman, a trophy wife who may look sexy but doesn’t have much interest in sex other than what it gets her.  The trophy wife sees sex as give and take.  She’s interested in what she can take from this man and her goal is to give as little in return as possible.  I think these kinds of women will always have tension in their relationships.”

 

“Woman can control men with sex in two different ways.  A woman can control her husband by giving him the best sex he’s ever had.  This is called keeping her man happy.  That man’s so fulfilled and grateful he happily gives his wife the things which make her happy.  They go through life giving to each other and have a healthy relationship…Probably without infidelity.”

 

“Unfortunately, the most prevalent way women control men is by withholding sex.  These women have sex with you in order to set the hook…to trap you…to get you addicted like a pusher would give you that first fix of heroin.  Once the man’s in her sexual web then she controls him because he wants it more than she does.  She doesn’t care about the sex.  She wants the control and can hold out for as long as it takes to get him to do exactly what she wants.  The man finally gives in saying, Okay, okay, I’ll do anything.  Just let me make love to you.”

 

“Remember Stella?  Her only motivation to have sex seemed to be to hurt people.  She’d have sex with one man to set the hook and gain total control in a relationship.  Sometimes she’d go have sex with one man in order to hurt another man.  She enjoyed seeing a man suffer with the jealousy and pain he felt when he suspected or knew she was with another man.”

 

“It’s probably not that common but some women have sex with men for sport.  For them it’s like a notch on their belt.  Maybe they’re after famous athletes or powerful men…Monica Lewinsky.”

 

“Related to that but more sinister are women who actually try to break up a marriage.  For these women that would be the ultimate affirmation of their powers of seduction.  They find a man they can’t have.  They seduce him into an affair…which would be the easy part.  But then they’re drawn to the ultimate challenge.  Is their allure so powerful they can get this guy to ruin his marriage just to be with her?  Consider this guy.  His wife’s been disinterested in sex for years.  Now he’s having the best sex of his life…The mistress is making sure of that.  This unbelievable sex is made even hotter by the element of secrecy and the taboo of an extramarital affair.  The mistress tells him everything he wants to hear.  He’s the best lover in her life.  She loves him more than he can know.  She can’t live without him.  Let’s face it.  This is every man’s dream.  He’s now tempted to tear apart his family…his kids.  But can he believe this mistress?  Is it him she’s in love with or is she in love with the game she’s in?  Is she actually motivated by the challenge of winning the prize?  Maybe the secrecy and the taboo of an illicit affair make it more than it really is for her too.  Maybe she’s motivated by the challenge and she’ll loose interest after he leaves his wife.  That man needs to know why the mistress is having sex with him.  Is it because she’s a woman who loves him and loves making love to him?  That’s what he hopes and believes.  But what if that’s not the truth?  What if the mistress is having sex with this man because of other motivations?  Sometimes a woman’s true motivation behind her sexual desires can be difficult to ever really know.”

 

“Most of those examples I just mentioned for why a woman would have sex with a man…other than for the enjoyment of sex…were a bit devious…or at least could be.  Women can feel sexual desires for a man for more simple and healthy reasons like to win a man’s approval.  When a man makes love to a woman it makes her feel beautiful and loved.  She may enjoy those feelings which come with being found sexy and desirable as much as she enjoys the sex.”

 

“Maybe a woman loves having sex with her husband or boyfriend because that’s the only time she can get his undivided attention.  It’s the only time she feels intimate with him.  She craves that intimacy and connection but her man’s just too distracted with his career and his hobbies and his buddies.  Making love is the only way she gets him all to herself.”

 

“Now I’m not saying every woman out there is sexually dysfunctional and deceptive about her sexuality.  That’s not the case.  However, I do believe every woman’s sexuality is unique and perhaps more difficult to understand than most men know.  And I do believe this topic is extremely important for men to understand.  I believe sometimes men are walking in a mine field and don’t know it.  I think a lot of men don’t realize how important knowing a woman’s true sexuality is…until they marry her.”

 

“Let’s talk about marriage…Actually, let’s talk first about when a man’s single and in a relationship with a girlfriend or fiancé.  Usually in this phase the man’s satisfied with his sex life.  If he wasn’t satisfied then he wouldn’t be with her.  He’d break up with her and find a more sensual girl.  He certainly wouldn’t move forward into marriage with a girl he wasn’t satisfied with.  In other words, having a girlfriend and finding out you aren’t sexually compatible is no big deal.  You break up.  No lawyers and no property settlement are involved.  Now back to marriage…because finding out you have a wife you aren’t sexually compatible with is a really big deal.”

“Of course, every man hopes he and his wife will continue to be completely compatible after they’re married, just like they were before.  They live happily ever after in a loving and sharing relationship.  Life is good.”

 

“But let me throw out a common scenario.  Both the man and wife are sexually compatible before they get married and for a time after marriage.  Everything’s good but then things change.  The man doesn’t know why and often the woman doesn’t understand it either.  But her reasons for feeling sexual go away and her desires fade.  Here’s an example:  Say a woman’s true sexuality isn’t very strong.  She doesn’t mind sex but she can live without it too.  However, as a young woman she found sex to be something new and thrilling.  Her sexual desires were stimulated when she was dating her future husband…She was in seduction mode and she enjoyed making love.  Then she gets married and her sexual desires continue as she dreams of having children.  But then she has her children and she has her husband and she’s secure in her relationship.  She no longer has a need to seduce her husband…They’re married.  She no longer needs to get pregnant…They have their children.  Her reasons for feeling sexual have gone away and so has her sex drive.  She may not even know exactly why that is.  What she does know is she’s very content as she goes on to the next phase of her life which is child rearing and mothering and building a nest.  She’s happy and fulfilled…And there’s nothing wrong with that.  Being a wife and mother is healthy and wonderful for her.  The husband has a good wife to take care of him and his children…But, his wife no longer seems interested in the sexual relationship they used to enjoy.  He doesn’t know why.  She doesn’t know why.  She says it’s because she doesn’t have time anymore.  She always says she’s too tired.  What happened is the wife settled into her true sexuality, which isn’t as strong as she or her husband thought.”

 

“Okay, here’s another possible scenario which can happen when a man marries a woman and he’s clueless about her true sexuality.  This is when a man marries a woman who’s deceitful about her true motives for seducing and marrying him.  Her intention is to marry him but not for true love.  Maybe it’s for money or security.  Maybe she wants the good life.  Maybe she’s a controlling bitch.  Unfortunately, there are women out there who have bad intentions and everyday unsuspecting men marry women with these pathologies.  The man, of course, thought everything was perfect because she made sure he thought that.  She seduced him well and he thought he was in heaven.  But the day they got married everything changed.  Remember the story of Dan and Myrna?  He told me she was a sex kitten before they got married but then everything changed.  I asked him when things changed.  He said the first day of the honeymoon.  I thought he was kidding but he wasn’t.  She actually refused to have sex on the honeymoon.”

 

I occasionally interrupted Michael with questions during this discussion but for the most part he’d been on a role and I’d been listening.  I was still wrapping my arms around the entire concept…I should say reality…that women have different levels of sexual desire.  So many questions were coming to mind…Not the least of which was how do you know a woman’s true sexuality?  But first things first and I said, “Okay, you’ve put the fear of God into me.  This entire conversation makes getting married sound like a throw of the dice.  I’ve heard anecdotal stories before of men who were sexually frustrated in their marriage but I didn’t really take them seriously.  I suppose I’d always dismissed them as something which may happen occasionally but would never happen to me.  Now, I’m terrified.”

 

“Well, it’s a serious decision to make and should be made based on more than she looks hot in jeans.  There should be three criteria for choosing a wife:  Physical appearance, personality and values…and sexual compatibility.  You hear about sexually frustrated husbands all the time with anecdotal stories or themes in sitcoms and movies or in jokes.  Do you know how to paralyze a woman from the waist down?  Marry her.”

 

“I watched a movie last week, Four Dead Batteries.  It starts kind of slowly but then you get into the stories.  It’s about 4 friends and their various struggles with relationships.  Anyway, at one point one of the friends is explaining that before he got married everything was perfect but then after they got married they traded sex for IKEA.  That’s hilarious…and true.  Women get married and move to the next phase of their life which is building a nest.”

 

“Remember some years ago when Hugh Grant was caught and arrested with a hooker.  When that happened he was in a long term relationship with an English super model, Elizabeth Hurley.  She was considered one of the most beautiful women in the world.  The mug shot of the hooker made her look…uh…not very attractive.  I remember the media wringing their hands and asking how and why Hugh Grant would want to be with this unattractive hooker when he has such a beautiful woman at home…He had it all!  Well, maybe he didn’t have it all.  Maybe he wasn’t getting the sexual satisfaction he needed.”

 

“There’s an old saying.  There are 2 kinds of older women – those who like sex and those who don’t.  There are 3 types of young women – those who like sex, those who don’t…and those who don’t like sex but haven’t figured it out yet.”

 

Now it was late and Michael had to go.  I had a lot of questions I wanted to ask at that point.  In fact, after he left I jotted down some notes so I wouldn’t forget them.

 

***********************

 

Monday I called Kim and suggested we get together after work for dinner sometime this week.  I had a mental list of places to go which would be close by for both of us…And that was a good thing because she asked if I had anywhere special in mind.  I threw out the first name and she was enthusiastic about it.  We made plans to meet on Thursday at 5:30.

 

Later in the afternoon I called Kristin.  We chatted for a while and I suggested we meet for lunch sometime.  She told me she’d love to but this week her school work and work schedule were so crazy she just wouldn’t be able to have time.  I was a little unprepared for that.  She continued to be enthusiastic about getting together and made me promise to call her next week.  I told her I understood and we’d make it another time.  I hung up the phone and analyzed the call.  I thought about the tone in her voice.  She sounded happy to hear from me.  She was enthusiastic and she repeatedly mentioned getting together…just not this week.

 

Friday morning I got an email from Michael asking if we were on for drinks after work.  I was anxious to tell him about my date with Kim the night before.  We met at the usual place and spent a few minutes admiring some attractive girls who’d come in at the same time we did.  “Let me tell you about my dinner with Kim.  It all went very well.  We had nice conversations on many different topics.  The subject of her old relationship came up and it sounds like she broke up with him.  She didn’t say anything bad about him…just that he wanted to get married and she wasn’t ready for that.  She’s quite funny and has a lot of positive energy.  I’m attracted to her.  She’s fun, pretty, energetic…it’s all good.  We talked about sports and she loves to play tennis so we’re getting together Saturday to play.  That was her idea.  I was kind of surprised.  She said she hadn’t played in a while and asked if I wanted to play Saturday morning.  I said yes.”

 

“I already told you Kristin said she’s too busy this week with school and work to get together.  She seems interested and said she wants to do something next week so we’ll see but right now I’m getting more and more interested in Kim.”  Then I reached into my pocket to get my notes.  “Okay, remember I emailed you and told you I had some questions for you after our conversation last Sunday?  I brought my notes.”

Michael reached into his jacket to retrieve a print out and said, “When I got your questions in the email, I jotted down some things too…But first let me tell you some interesting things Stephanie told me.  We’ve gotten to that phase in the relationship where we admit to each other we have feelings for one another.  It’s that admission that this is more than dating.  Anyway, she told me she was attracted to me that first night when she was our waitress but she really became interested because I was friendly and charming…and not hitting on her.  She was sure I must have a girlfriend.  She said she was surprised when I suggested we go out to lunch and even then she thought I must be dating other girls because I wasn’t in a hurry or trying to get her into bed.”

 

Michael leaned forward like he didn’t want our conversation to be overheard.  “And, we haven’t gone to bed yet.  We have this unspoken agreement to go slowly and enjoy the anticipation…and the anticipation is awesome.  Underwear sex can really be hot.  You spend a lot more time finding ways to arouse each other.  Here’s a good lesson to learn:  You know the girl’s special when you don’t mind waiting.  If a girl’s just another girl you want to get into bed then you’re impatient and pushing her for sex…I think smart girls know this.”  Michael leaned back and pointed to my notes.  “Okay, you emailed me those questions but remind me.”

 

“Well, Sunday night we talked about how different women can have different levels of sexuality.  We talked about how there can be different motivations for wanting sex and we talked about possible ulterior motives women might have.  And, we talked about how a woman’s sexuality can fade or be replaced with things which are now more important to her like building a nest and raising children.  You referred to a joke about 3 types of young women…those who like sex, those who don’t and those who don’t like sex but haven’t figure it out yet.”  Now I paused to collect my thoughts.  “So if sometimes women don’t even know if they like sex or not, how do I know if they like sex?”  I paused again.  “How do I learn or know a woman’s true sexuality?  Do I have to be clairvoyant?  How do I unlock this mystery?”

 

Michael smiled and said, “I’ve been pondering this since I got your email and I’ve been making notes for a few days.  As I look at all those notes I realize it’s not like some formula you can solve or a flow chart you can go through with a series of questions which leads you to the answer.  It’s far more of an art than a science and it’s all about clues you learn to recognize.  Let me back up and tell you about a good friend of mine.  In college I took a graduate business course and became friends with one of the students in the class, Fernando.  He’s from Argentina and we became pretty good friends.  We play tennis and still get together sometimes for lunch.  When I met him he was 35.  He has 2 kids and his wife’s from Argentina too.  His wife’s drop dead gorgeous…I mean she has a perfect body and beautiful face…and she’s a lawyer like him.  Anyway, this was an evening class and a few times a group of us went out for a drink after class.  Fernando and I started talking and the subject went to women.  He started talking about one of the girls in the class he thought was hot.  I pointed out a different girl in the class I was hot for.  Fernando looked at her and said, In 10 years she’ll be fat, cold and angry.”

 

Michael laughed and then continued with the story.  “I almost fell off my chair I was laughing so hard.  I asked Fernando how he knew that.  He told me he knew how to tell about women.  I was intrigued and asked how he knew.  His entire story came out over the years we’ve known each other but basically he married his high school sweetheart…and I can see why because she’s stunning.  But then over the years and after the kids were born he found out she doesn’t like sex and he’s totally frustrated.  He came to realize just because a girl looks like your wildest fantasy, it doesn’t mean she’s going to be your perfect sex partner.  That realization led him to the importance of knowing about a woman’s sexuality.  By the way, Fernando and his wife divorced a few years after I met him.”

 

“Over the years knowing Fernando I came to realize he really did know about women and I learned a lot from him.  Basically, he said you have to develop an instinct to recognize the clues.  I appreciated him because his advice was always down to earth and good.”

 

“Now I want you to compare what Fernando said about the girl in my class…and that girl was beautiful…and the typical thing you’d hear from most men.  This has happened to me more than once.  A guy and I will be at work or at a class and we’re discussing a girl.  I’ll say she’s pretty but I don’t think she likes sex and the guy will respond, Are you kidding?  Of course she likes sex…look at her.  She’s hot!”

“I think the first thing Fernando told me was to stop thinking like that.  You have to look behind the appearance.  He also told me when you’re determining a woman’s level of interest in sex you have to beware of making a judgment based on how sex is the first night or the first week.  The novelty and excitement of a new relationship can make her more interested in sex.  She may have gone a long time without making love or having male attention so she’s starved for affection.  She may then loose interest as time goes on and as the relationship becomes more secure for her.”

 

“That’s what often happens with a woman who’s only moderately interested in sex.  On the other hand a woman who truly enjoys sex will enjoy it more as the two of you become more comfortable and learn more about what each other want and like.”

 

“Okay, let’s get to the clues…And remember there are no rules or absolutes about this.  It really is instinctual.  We’ve talked about the first clues.  When you’re first dating and getting to know her you find out her relationship history.  Has she dated a lot?  If not, why?  Does she have long relationships in her past or short ones?  Here’s an important question to ask…Why is this girl single and available?  If you’re in high school together and know her then it’s obvious.  The same would go for college but once a girl is over 25 years old you have to seriously ask yourself that question.  What if you meet a girl who’s 32 and she’s never had a boyfriend.  Is this a girl who feels no need for romance but suddenly her biological clock is ticking and she now realizes she wants to have a family?  She may be a wonderful girl but she may not be very sexually oriented.”

 

“Try to imagine all the possible dating and relationship histories and all the possible circumstances you may run into.  There’s no book or program out there to interpret it.  You’re left to your own interpretation of what her dating history may tell you…And that’s but one clue among many.

 

“What does physical appearance tell us?  I’m not sure it tells us anything.  I’ve heard generalities that beautiful girls get all the male attention they want so it’s not as important to them.  But, plain girls don’t get as much attention so they’re more appreciative.  They may enjoy affection more.  Maybe they feel they have to work for it more so they’re more passionate and better partners in bed.  All of that has a ring of logic to it but I’m sure there are plenty of plain looking girls out there who don’t like sex.  I do think plain looking girls make better partners…Just ask someone who has a trophy wife.”

 

“Now personality is a different thing.  I think that can tell us a lot.  What about the outgoing and flirtatious girl.  Especially the over the top flirts and the ones who’re sexually suggestive and the ones who openly flirt like they want everyone to know how hot they are.  Are they really that sexual?  I’ve seen many men draw that conclusion but I’m not convinced of that.  When I see a girl who’s very flirtatious and outgoing I’m always a bit suspicious…especially if she flirts with everyone.  My best guess is this type of girl is all show and no action.”

“A truly sensual and sexual girl will flirt with sexual innuendo but quietly and only to the guy she wants…not in front of everyone.  Often the truly hot women are shy and secretive about it.  They’ll dress more modestly.”

 

“I always think the shy, quiet type of girl is going to be more sensual.  Sometimes I meet a girl like that and I can’t help but think she’s just this bundle of passion waiting to come out of her shell…behind a bedroom door of course.”

 

“Here’s another one.  I’m always suspicious of a girl who spends hours primping herself and always making sure she looks as perfect as she can.  I don’t mean a girl who dresses nicely and does her hair…I mean a girl who is obsessive about it.  She’s in the bathroom every hour to check her hair and makeup.  I have to wonder if that girl is insecure about her lack of sexuality so she compensates for it with a compulsion to look perfect.  Said another way, when that girl looks into her bag of tricks to see what she has to attract, seduce and hold on to a man, hot sex isn’t there so she compensates by looking as pretty as she can.  Of course this isn’t a hard and fast rule but I think it especially applies to girls who are above average in looks.  I mean, if a girl’s already pretty then why’s she so obsessive about her looks?  Women know their sexuality is important to men so looking sexy is their way of compensating for not being sexy.”

 

“Do you remember the movie Fast Times at Ridgemont High?  There are two girls who are main characters.  Stacy is blonde and her friend, Linda, has dark hair.  They work at a pizza place in the mall.  When the movie starts Stacy’s a virgin and doesn’t know anything about sex.  Linda talks all the time like she’s the experienced expert on sex and men.  She’s always talking about sex with her boyfriend who’s older and lives in another city.  Of course, she has to be faithful to her boyfriend and that’s why she doesn’t date in high school.  As the movie goes on you begin to realize the out of town boyfriend is fictional and Linda’s all talk, afraid of men and probably a virgin.”

 

“I know Linda’s a character in a movie but I think that type of woman is authentic.  I’ve met girls like that.  They want everyone to know how experienced and knowledgeable they are and I’m just not buying it.  In my opinion, the really sexual girls don’t broadcast it.  They’re protective of their sexuality and treat it like a secret for fear of being thought of as easy or a slut.”

 

“I think I’ve mentioned this neighbor of mine, the model.  She’s in her early 30s, perfect figure, perfect hair, beautiful face and a single mom.  This is one of those times you ask yourself why this girl is single.  If she loves sex then why is she divorced?  What man wants to divorce a beautiful woman who loves sex?  Okay, one could argue her ex-husband is a bum and she had to divorce him…Then why hasn’t she remarried?  She could snap her fingers and have any number of men chasing after her…Handsome men and successful men.  If she loved sex then she’d want a relationship.  I don’t really know much about her but if I was a betting man…I’d bet she doesn’t like sex.”

 

I’d been listening and taking notes.  Many of Michael’s explanations reminded me of girls I’d dated or known.  There was the ring of truth to all of it.  I interrupted here to ask some questions which came to mind.  “I have a friend who is convinced skinny girls are cold.  He’s funny.  He has a skinny girlfriend and is jaded.  He claims they’re all cold, neurotic and angry…all from the self-denial of food.  He’d go on a rant about how his skinny girlfriend can never enjoy a meal.  She’d eat half a cookie, declare herself a pig and go into depression over it.  What do you think about that?

 

Michael smiled and thought for a moment.  “That’s funny.  I never thought about that but that model is skinny.  I will say this about skinny women and that is 80% of men think thin is perfection.  I often think thin girls get a lot of attention and become spoiled rotten.  They think they’re all that.  So if you’re one of those 80% of men who love thin girls, you’re in for a lot of competition and putting up with spoiled women.”

 

“On the other hand, if you find full figured women to be attractive then go for it and ignore the social pressures.  Those women get less attention and will be grateful for the attention they get.  Are they more sexual?  I don’t know.”

 

“Like I told you, my uncle swears by Astrology and I never thought much of it until I had that girlfriend who taught me about the different personality types of the signs.  Honestly, I think it provides a valuable clue to learn a woman’s sexuality.  But, this is something you need to examine yourself.  Think back to ex-girlfriends and see if their birth sign was an accurate indicator of their sexuality.  Be open-minded about it.  I printed out these brief descriptions of the signs and more or less divided them into hot, cold or ambiguous.  Take a look at this while I go outside for a minute to call Stephanie.  I think we’re getting together later after her work.”

 

I looked at Michael’s printout and began to read through the signs.

 

Astrology and Women’s Sexuality

 

These are brief thumbnail sketches.  The phrase, “In general,” could be put in front of each description.  There will always be exceptions.

 

Aries March 21 – April 20 – Aries women understand sex.  They can be very hot, very sexual, passionate and love the passion of love.  But, they can also be indifferent with sex.  And, Aries love their freedom and can run away from commitment.  They often fall in love…or maybe lust…in an instant and then out of love just as quickly.

 

Taurus April 21 – May 21 – They’re the best lovers.  They’re very romantic and need a partner…a lover…in their life.  They want love and marriage and are faithful partners.  They have a strong need for sex.  They’re sensual and affectionate.  They love sex for all the right reasons.  They love the emotional connection, the touching, the passion, the holding, the pillow talk and the complete surrender.  They love the before, the during and the after of making love.

 

Gemini May 22 – June 21 – Gemini are usually very sexual and uninhibited with their passion.  They love how it feels and love the partner they’re with.  When you make love with a Gemini woman you get the feeling she is not holding anything back.  She completely surrenders to the moment.   Though, sometimes a Gemini can be a bit frivolous.  They can convince themselves and a man he’s the love of her life…but then she can have a short attention span and move on to whoever next interests her.  With that carefree nature, often young Gemini women will avoid a serious relationship until they’re older.  They’ll wake up one day at age 30 and realize it’s time to be serious with love and career.

 

Cancer June 22 – July 23 – They’re very warm and sexual.  Their love relationship is everything for them and they don’t feel whole without it.  They’re sensual and love to be touched, stroked, cuddled and held.  They love the romantic touches like flowers and valentines.  An added bonus for the Cancer woman is she’s very judicious with money and a fabulous homemaker.  She’ll make a wonderful wife but treat her well because she needs to feel the love and support of her partner.

Leo July 24 – August 23 – They’re an ambiguous sign.  They can be very sexual but it’s often for sex and not love.  They’re more in love with themselves and can lack feelings.  They want to be the leader and are often comfortable single without a need for a love connection.  You may find a Leo woman who loves sex.  You may find a Leo who isn’t that interested in it.

 

Virgo August 24 – September 23 – Virgo is the sign of the virgin and that’s an apt description.  The Virgo woman is often the last to lose her virginity because they just aren’t that interested in sex.  Virgos have many qualities.  They’re tidy, organized and honest…sometimes to a fault.  You want to hire a Virgo to run your business…however it’s tough to be married to one.

 

Libra September 24 – October 23 – They’re another ambiguous sign.  They’re sensual, romantic and in love with love but they’re not quick to be aroused and seldom initiate lovemaking.  They need a patient partner who’ll give her caressing, massaging and foreplay.  Some Libras are hot and passionate while some aren’t very interested in sex.

 

Scorpio October 24 – November 22 – They’re probably the most sexual sign.  They love sex and the more passionate the better.  They can often make bad choices in men because they choose with their libido instead of their head.  They can be an insatiable partner who wants it all night long.

 

Sagittarius November 23 – December 21 – They’re an ambiguous sign.  They may enjoy sex but more often they have little need for it.  The Sagittarius woman is freedom loving and restless.  They really have no need to share their feelings and are completely comfortable living alone.  They can have a fling with no feelings and that’s okay.  The Sagittarius woman makes a great friend or partner.  They’re content, positive even tempered and easy to be with.  Very little bothers them because they have too much fun doing the things they love to do.  The down side to them being so even natured is their emotions and feelings are way behind a wall and even they can seldom find them.

 

Capricorn December 22 – January 20 – They’re also an ambiguous sign that more often is less sexual.  If the Virgo is the last to lose her virginity, the Capricorn is the second to the last.  They’re logical, responsible and loyal and make good partners but maybe not a sexual animal.

 

Aquarius January 21 – February 19 – They’re also an ambiguous sign that may or may not have a strong sexuality.  They’re an air sign which is appropriate because the Aquarius loves her freedom and often wants to fly away.  They feel life is to be enjoyed.  They’re fun and funny and seldom burden themselves with boring details.  They enjoy sex because it’s fun…not because they have a burning need for it so they can live without it.  An Aquarius makes a wonderful partner but they need their space.  Find one who’s sexual and you’ll go through life smiling.

 

Pisces February 20 – March 20 – They generally don’t like sex.  They’re very emotional and also illogical and irrational.  They’re masters of applying rules and standards to others which they don’t have to obey.  They’re often very seductive with sex but once they have what they want, they become cold as ice.

 

The Summary:

The most sexual/best lovers – Taurus, Gemini, Cancer, Scorpio

The ones in the middle – Aries, Libra, Sagittarius, Aquarius

The ones who maybe don’t like sex – Virgo, Capricorn, Leo, Pisces

 

Michael came back to the table and apologized for taking so long.  I pointed to Michael’s Astrology printout and said, “I read through this and…Do you remember I told you about a girlfriend I had who never wanted sex and it was always my fault?  I was reading about Virgos and that girl sounds just like a Virgo.  Besides never wanting sex, she was organized to a fault…a bit obsessive about it.  I wonder if she’s a Virgo…I’d love to know.”  I thought for a moment, pulled out my phone and I still had her number in the memory.  I looked at Michael, smiled and pressed the call button.  “…Hi Lori, this is Robert…Yeah, it’s been a while…Doing fine…Listen, I called to wish you a happy birthday…I thought your birthday was in June…September…September 9th.  How did I forget that?  …Yes, we should get together…You have my number?  …I look forward to it.”  I hung up, referred to the printout and looked at Michael with my mouth wide open.  “Oh, my God!  That’s so funny.”

 

Michael laughed and said, “Trust me.  It’s not always that easy…and those are generalities.  If nothing else, it makes for light conversation when you meet someone…”

 

“…So I’m going to meet Stephanie at 10pm when she gets off.  She wants us to come over there to eat now.  I told her I’d call her back to let her know.  What’s your pleasure?”

 

“You know, Kristen passed on going out…She was very positive and let me know she’s interested but I think I’d feel like a clingy little puppy dog going over to where she works…especially on a Friday night.  Like I have nothing else to do but wait for her to have time for me.” 

Michael smiled and told me that’s why he told her he’d call her back.  He pulled out his phone and called Stephanie.  “Hi, listen Robert has some friends here and the group is just getting ready to order so I’m going to join them.  I’ll see you at 10pm…”  Michael hung up, acknowledged his little white lie and said, “Okay, shall we take the line of least resistance and order something here because I’m starving?”

 

We got a waitress and ordered and then I asked Michael, “I have another question about predicting a woman’s sexuality.  We talked about a lot of different clues but most of those had to do with her profile…Things like her appearance, her relationship history, how she talks about sex or if she’s overly flirtatious, her marital status, Astrology…What about your interaction with the girl?”

 

Michael gave me a big smile and said, “Thank you for recognizing that important distinction.  The clues we’ve talked about are her profile.  The most important things are your interaction with her…though usually the interaction is a confirmation of the profile or vise-versa.  So let’s talk about the clues you can get from your interaction with a girl.  What would be examples?”

 

“Let’s talk about the body language.  Does she sit close to you or with a distance between you?  When sitting together, does she let her leg touch yours?  Does she stand close to you or with a distance between you?  Does she stand facing you or to the side?  Is she comfortable holding your hand and does she enjoy it?

 

“I think you can tell a lot from walking with a girl.  A sensual girl will walk closely and brush against you.  She’ll take your arm if she wants to direct you to where she wants to walk.  She’ll take your arm and hold it against her body.  The sensual girl will do those things because she wants physical and sensual contact.  To her, being with you at the mall, or where ever, is more than shopping.  It’s an opportunity to express all the passion she’s feeling.”

 

“Dancing with a girl should tell you everything you want to know.  A sensual girl will pull you in closer.  She’ll touch her breasts to you.  She’ll look you in the eyes.  She’ll brush her leg against your groin to feel if you have an erection.  You’ll feel a sensual connection.  Cold girls simply dance the steps and look past you.”

“The first kiss is a dead give-away.  A cold girl’s kiss is mechanical.  She’s kissing you because that’s what people do and she sees it in the movies so she imitates it.  For a sensual girl, any kiss…but especially a first kiss…is something which takes her breath away.  She’ll be trembling and shaking as her lips touch yours.  The embrace is the same way.  When you embrace a sensual girl and press against her pelvis she’ll press back.  A cold girl won’t.  That gentle pelvic press is a huge indicator…”

 

“…Let’s go back to the first kiss.  I’ll never forget my first kiss with Anita.  She’s that young girl I dated who was so comfortable with her sexuality.  We’d been going out on dates as friends for a few weeks.  Now I’d brought her home and we were standing in her driveway talking.  Neither of us wanted to leave.  We both knew we wanted to kiss.  We talked and talked and then there was that long silence.  Everything we did was delicate.  I put my hand on her shoulder.  She touched my elbow and pulled me a little closer.  We both leaned towards each other and touched our cheeks.  Then I brushed my lips against her cheek.  She brushed her lips against my cheek.  We touch noses.  Finally, after a minute or two of this we brushed our lips against each other very lightly.  At that point, we were both trembling with anticipation.  Finally, we really kissed and embraced…But it was always delicate and soft.  That was amazing.  And you know what?  That never changed.  We’d make love and lay next to each other talking for 20 or 30 minutes.  Then she’d kiss me.  That’s all it would take and we’d be making love again.  One time we made love all evening.  I took her home and we were standing outside her house around 1am.  It was a hot summer night.  We kissed each other good night and that was all it took.  We started pulling off our clothes and made love leaning against my car…”

 

“…Sorry, I digress.  Let me ask you about the girl you just called, Lori the Virgo.  Consider everything we’ve talked about.  If you could go back in time to when you met her and started dating her, could you predict she’d have little interest in sex?”

 

I thought for a second and then said, “Let’s see.  Lori was more or less average looking so I didn’t ask myself why she was single.  Her dating history was a bit suspicious because she had nothing good to say about her ex-boyfriend.  I’m not sure if that relates to sex or not but everything was his fault and I later learned that was a pattern with her.  Her birth sign would’ve been a warning and probably would’ve alerted me about things to notice with our interactions as we started dating.  Looking back I realize her body language was cold.  At movies I’d put my hand on her leg and there was no response like putting her hand on mine.  I’d hold her hand but I got nothing in return.  In the theater she never leaned against me like a warm person will do.  One time she wanted to go to a bar having a country swing dance night.  My first thought was an opportunity for some body contact.  Learning some swing dance steps was of little importance.  It was the opposite for Lori.  I really don’t think there was anything romantic about dancing for her.  She was only there to learn the dance moves…And learning to dance is a good thing but if touching and holding your date has no romantic implications for a girl then that’s a clue about her sexuality.  I remember that evening I was getting aroused with her breasts touching my chest.  I gave a little pelvic push against her and there was no response…There was no gentle push back…Nothing.  I honestly have to wonder if she even felt it.  I might as well have pushed against the fender of my car…Hell, if the engine’s running at least I’d get some vibration.”

 

Michael and I got a good laugh out that one.  Then he asked me about the first kiss.  “Well, it was nothing compared to your first kiss with Anita, that’s for sure.  All of Lori’s kisses were mechanical.  She’d just push her lips against mine.  For her kissing was something she had to do so she did it to get it over with.  She had this really irritating way of kissing and pulling away to let me know we were through kissing now.  Like she was saying, There, we’re through kissing.  A few times Lori wanted to make a kiss passionate like thanking me for a present or something.  She’d mash her face against mine and jamb her tongue into my mouth.  There was no sensuality…just more physical effort.”

 

Michael jumped in here.  “Speaking of that, you recall my description of my first kiss with Anita.  To me that’s how to make a kiss sensual and emotional and passionate.  Sometimes I see in a movie a kiss which is built up with big anticipation.  Maybe it’s a first kiss or the lovers have been apart for a long time or maybe they thought they’d never see each other again…You know the scenes I’m talking about.  Anyway, this is a big moment in the movie and two actors grab each other and mash their faces together.  It almost looks violent.  When I see that I’m wondering what in the world the director’s thinking.  The scene calls for a romantic sensual kiss and instead we get this mash face…But, what do I know.  I’m not a movie director…”

 

“…I digressed again.  I want to get back to my question about Lori.  Knowing what you know now, would all those clues have predicted her sexuality?”

I nodded my head and said, “Yes, I could’ve saved myself some time and frustration.  Going by what you say about Virgos, I would’ve had a warning right off the bat.  Then the body language warnings I described would’ve been a confirmation.  I may have cut it off there and not let a relationship develop.  Though, knowing me I would’ve continued dating her because Lori had a body I really wanted.  So, let’s say I continued dating her like I did and we ended up in a sexual relationship like we did.  The truth is our first night together was great.  She was involved and a good sex partner.  And for a while the sex was pretty good.  Then after a month or so her lack of interest in sex came out.  She started finding reasons not to have sex.  When I pressed the issue she told me it was because she needed foreplay.  So then I’d kiss her on the lips and she wouldn’t respond…So much for efforts at foreplay.  One time we were in bed and I put my hand on her breast and she told me not to do that.  I asked why and she actually said because it turned her on…Please explain that logic.  She wants foreplay but not if it turns her on?  Anyway, bottom line is I was with Lori for a year and that would’ve been shortened to maybe 4 months.  I would’ve understood her sexuality.  I would’ve understood she fell into that third group of 25% of women who don’t hate sex but can take it or leave it…and actually, would just as soon leave it.  Like you say, there’s nothing wrong with her sexuality…It’s just not the level of sexuality I’m looking for.  I would’ve moved on.”

 

Michael pondered that for a while and then said, “I think girls like Lori are confused and can’t quite figure it out.  They hear their friends talking about great sex.  They hear it talked about in movies and books.  They get the sense sex is something everyone else wants and enjoys so much they’ll risk their marriage and career for it.  Yet, they don’t feel the need.  And when they have sex it doesn’t do that much for them.  They listen to their friends talk about amazing orgasms but they don’t have them and don’t feel a desire for one.  If they talk to their friends about it or read articles in Cosmo, they’re told, Oh, you just don’t have the right guy.  He doesn’t know how to touch you just right.  He isn’t endowed well enough.  And then she can cast the blame onto her partner instead of examining her own sexuality.”

 

I sighed and said, “That describes Lori.  I think she’s confused about sex.  We’re just different in our sexual needs.  It’s too bad because Lori’s a quality person.  She’s smart and talented.  She loves outdoor activities.  She’s responsible.  She works hard at her career.  She’s fun to be with.  I was attracted to all those things and stayed with her for all those reasons.  It’s hard to find women with all those qualities.  But, I need a physical relationship with romance and passion.  Truthfully, our discussion of how different women have different appetites for sex confirms for me that breaking it off with Lori was the right thing to do.  Sometimes I’d second guess that decision.  Now I don’t.”

 

By now, we’d finished our meals and were both ready to head out.  Michael was meeting Stephanie later and I was going over to Best Buy to see if they had any screaming deals on laptops.  Who knows, maybe I’d get lucky with some computer geek chic.  At least it gave me an opportunity to be friendly with some nice people.

 

************************

 

Sunday morning I got a call from Michael.  He wanted some exercise and I did too.  We met around 2pm and beat each other up on the tennis court for over an hour.  It felt good to play hard.  We sat down at the courts to cool off and Michael asked about my tennis date the day before with Kim.  “Well, get ready for a good story.  We met at the courts around 10:30 and she was just full of energy.  Kim likes being active so she showed up with a big smile on her face.  We started hitting balls and she’s a good player.  We had long rallies and she’s fun to play with.  At one point we came to the net to pick up balls and she said she really liked playing with me…it’s hard to find a partner who hits well.  I asked if she wanted to play games and she told me she was having too much fun just hitting.  So at first we just hit easy shots to each other and then we started making each other run and she loved that.  A couple of times she came to the net and I fed her fat ones she could put away and again she loved the energy we had going.  We pushed each other but it wasn’t competition.  It was like a game of cooperation.  Sometimes she or I’d hit a clear winner and we had fun dramatizing how good the shot was.  I think Kim enjoyed that my male ego didn’t take over and have to beat her.  She probably sees that as confidence.  One time she hit an amazing winner down the line and I gave her the I am not worthy bow.  She really laughed at that and likes to laugh and have fun.”

Chapter 8  The Relationship

Tuesday I received an email from Michael with the details on the new restaurant/bar opening.  We decided to get there before 5pm to beat the crowd and get a table.  When I arrived the place was already getting crowded but Michael had gotten there before me and had a table staked out.  We ordered some wings and sat back to enjoy the atmosphere.  Michael asked about Kim.  “Yes, we met after work yesterday for dinner.  She loves Olive Garden so we went there.  We had a good time.  She’s fun to be with…and a smart girl, by the way.  We always have interesting conversations about many varied topics.  When we left I walked her to her car and we started kissing…She wanted me to come over to her house.  We walked in, started kissing, the clothes came off and we started making love where we stood.  We eventually made it to her bed.  I got home early though.  She had a bunch of things to get done around the house so I took off.”

“…Stephanie absolutely loved everything we did.  She went on and on about how much she felt and how it was the best in her life.  Having some patience really pays dividends and it’s not like you aren’t enjoying yourself along the way…”

 

“But Stephanie had some plans up her sleeve for Sunday night too.  I think she had two things in mind when she came over.  First, she wanted to spend the night, which would be our first time.  But, more importantly she wanted to have the relationship talk.  After we made love she started with the questions.  Am I your girlfriend?  Are we exclusive?  Is this different for you?  She was twisting herself into a pretzel talking around the L word.  She wants a commitment.  She wants a relationship.  And can you blame her.  That’s a normal and healthy thing for anyone to want.  She’s 27 and wants some stability in her life.  Most of the men she sees out there are either players or flakey in one aspect of their life or another.  Then she meets me.  I’ve never considered myself some incredible catch but Stephanie sure does.  She sees a guy with a good job and career.  I have no money problems.  I have no debt.  I’m not a lazy slob.  I’m responsible, upwardly mobile and bring nothing but positive energy into her life.  She wants to move to the next level.”

 

Watching Michael ponder the step from dating to relationship was interesting.  I said, “You know, most men never really make the decision to be in a relationship.  They start dating a girl and keep dating her because they’re getting steady sex and are too lazy to look for anyone else.  Then one day they wake up and find tampons in their bathroom and have to ask permission to go out with their friends.  Maybe it’s good or maybe it’s bad, but they’re now in a relationship.  So let’s talk about relationships.  I do financial analysis and feasibility studies all day long.  What are the positive reasons and the negative reasons to be in a relationship?”

 

Michael asked if I was talking about relationships in general or specifically Stephanie.  I wanted to talk about relationships in general.  He pondered the question and then began, “First of all, I think a lot of men see the relationship as the end of all the work.  They spent all this time finding the girl, meeting the girl, dating the girl, romancing the girl, getting the girl into bed and now they have a relationship so they can just sit back and enjoy the steady sex.  They think the work is over…I don’t think that’s true at all.  Consider this.  When you were dating she always saw you at your very best.  You were always showered and dressed and groomed and had your best foot forward.  You took her to expensive restaurants and spent more money than you ordinarily would, but that’s okay because it was all to impress her and convince her you were worthy of a relationship.  But now that you’re in a relationship, she’s going to be seeing you more often.  She’s going to see more of the real you.  She’ll see your weaknesses, your insecurities, your bad habits and your true financial condition…”

“…And maybe the image she has of you…the image you now have to live up to…is unreasonably lofty through no fault of your own.  It’s common for people to see someone they’re dating in as good a light as possible.  They’re caught up in the romance and excitement of meeting someone new and prefer to dwell on their attributes and ignore their shortcomings.  They say Hope springs eternal.  Many girls want to believe this new guy in their life is going to be their Prince Charming…”

 

“…So, when you begin a relationship, the hard work isn’t over.  You must continue to be aware of what women really want.  You must continue to be strong and in control of your life.  You must continue to romance her.  You must continue to be found attractive by other women so she knows she has a catch.  Consider this, human nature is to become bored and disenchanted with what we have.  And she has you now.”

 

“Let’s list the good and bad things about being in a relationship.

 

What’s bad about being in a relationship?

  1. You think you can relax, but they can’t.

  2. You lose your freedom.

  3. You’re trapped.  There’s no easy way to break up now.

  4. You’re now emotionally invested.  She can hurt you.

 

What’s good about being in a relationship?

  1. You get steady sex.

  2. You have a partner to enjoy the good times with.

  3. You’re no longer lonely.

  4. You now have support when times are tough.

 

“So if you’re thinking about beginning a relationship you need to look at those lists.  You also need to honestly look at yourself and the girl.  What are you expecting from a relationship?  If your life is miserable and think if you just had a girlfriend you’ll be happy, then you’re asking too much out of a relationship.  You’re probably unhappy with yourself and have some self-esteem problems.  On the other hand, if you’re happy and enjoying your life and you want to find a partner to share it all with then a relationship is right for you.”

 

“Something else to consider is the strength of any relationship is based on how you treat each other.  Both you and the girl invested a lot of time and energy to meet each other and date and develop a friendship and romance, so now what are you going to do with this opportunity?  Have you given any thought to what you have to give to this girl?  Are you ready to be a thoughtful and supportive partner?  And then after you’ve asked those questions you must ask if the girl is of the same mind…”

 

“…And all of this goes back to what you just said.  Most guys don’t ask themselves these questions.  They don’t ask if they or their girlfriend is ready for a relationship or if this is the right thing to do.  They just wake up one day and they’re in a relationship because that was the easy thing to do.”

 

“One time I heard someone say, Remember, the right woman makes you better than you are alone…Not feel better…Be better.  And that’s really it.  A lot of guys feel better with their trophy girlfriend but does she make him a better person?  Let me relate this to Stephanie.  She’s fun and easy to be with, but it’s more than that…It’s that it’s rewarding to be with her.  She’s an enthusiastic participant in everything we do.  She recognizes and thanks me for every little thing I do.  She makes me a better person not because she nags me to take out the trash.  She rewards me after I take out the trash.  She runs up to me, gives me a big hug, squeezes my butt and tells me what a stud I am.  And that makes her a true genius in life.  She goes through life spreading good feelings.”

 

“Compare that to all the women out there who go through life unhappy and angry.  They spend twice the energy nagging and bitching at their husbands as they would if they’d just give him what he really wants…a big hug and a kiss.”

 

“When we first started talking about this you said a lot of men see the relationship as the end of all the work, but you don’t think that’s true.  You think the work of being the man of her dreams continues.  Yet, when I think about you and Stephanie I see such a great friendship and compatibility and mutual respect that I don’t see how anything could go wrong in a relationship with her.”

 

Michael pondered this and then said, “I do think Stephanie is special.  And, I think she’s a real catch…But, it would be naïve of me to forget she’s human and a woman.  I’d like to think I can just coast along being in a relationship with Stephanie.  But, if I did that I’d be taking a big risk.”

 

“Let me just talk in general here about all women.  The problem we’re talking about is often the excitement of something new gives a girl these great feelings of romance and mystery and exploration.  But then a year later you’re doing the same things, life’s become routine and boring.  Now those feelings are gone.  She doesn’t feel the excitement she felt before and who does she blame?  The man gets blamed!”

 

“Before, you were only with each other on dates and special occasions.  Now, you share the dull and mundane activities of life like getting up, making breakfast and going to work.  Before, it was all fun.  Now, it’s cleaning house and paying bills.  In a figurative sense, the honeymoon is over…So will the magic continue.  I guess what I’m saying is no man should be foolish enough to think just because he’s in a relationship he can relax and stop courting her, romancing her and being the person she fell in love with.”

 

“Everything we talked about which was important for the first date is still important.  You can’t allow yourself to become boring.  You need to dress and groom yourself.  You have to deal with the waitress.  You have to be busy and important.  You have to be strong.  You need to be found attractive by other women.  You should even maintain some level of mystery about you.  In other words, you must still give her what she wants in a man.  Your relationship will stay strong as long as her feelings for you stay strong.  Women’s needs and desires don’t change just because they’re in a relationship.”

 

“This is going to sound cruel but it never hurts for a woman to be a little bit insecure in the relationship.  Fear of losing you will make her want you all the more.  What I mean by this is if a woman looks over on the couch and sees a lazy slob with no ambition drinking a beer and watching a basketball game, she starts to suspect her boyfriend or husband is a looser.  On the other hand if a woman looks at her boyfriend and sees a man who dresses nicely, takes care of himself, is successful, treats people well and is on his way out the door to play tennis with friends, then she knows he’s a catch.  She knows other women find a man like that attractive and she has to wonder how many women there’ll be at the tennis courts looking at him and thinking about stealing him away.  I’m not talking about a man cheating on his girlfriend or wife.  I’m talking about the natural tendency of people…women in particular…to feel insecure if they know their man has options.”

 

“Remember when I first met Stephanie she assumed I was dating someone because I didn’t come-on to her right away.  We can suppose Kim thought the same thing about you because of your self-confidence.  They didn’t see us with other women and we didn’t try to mislead them into thinking we were dating other women…But we wanted them to think we were seeing other women when we first started dating because it enhanced their perception of us.  And besides, it’s what they wanted to believe.  They wanted to believe we had things going for ourselves.”

“When you’re in a relationship, it’s not that you want to mislead them into thinking you’re seeing other women or cheating on them but you do want them to continue to be aware other women find you attractive and would like to be dating you.  And she’ll think that if you continue to be the type of man women find attractive.  It’s the nature of women to feel a bit insecure and to distrust other women.  So if she’s wondering about those other women at the tennis courts, then she’s a bit insecure and the knowledge other women find you attractive will intensify her desire to be with you.”

 

“Remember I mentioned my friend, Marcial?  He’d spent 6 years in the military so when I knew him in college he was older and more experienced than us.  He was the consummate womanizer and just had his way with all those naïve co-eds.    One time I was at his apartment.  We were reviewing together for an exam and his phone rang.  He picked up and immediately said, Someone’s here.  I’ll call you tomorrow.  He told me the call was from a girl he was dating.  I told him it wasn’t a problem if he wanted to talk.  I could wait.   He told me he’d done that on purpose to keep her guessing.  He could tell I was confused by what he’d just done and why so he explained it to me further.  I remember him telling me it’s good for a woman to know other women find her man attractive.  He said it doesn’t even hurt for her to suspect there are other women in his life…”

 

“…When I heard that and realized his motive I told him he was being cruel to the poor girl.  He said he wasn’t being cruel…He was giving her what she wants.  Then he explained it like this.  He said she’d rather have that little bit of insecurity, which equates to excitement, which equates to passion and desire than be 100% secure…and bored.  She’d recently dumped a guy and it was because he was boring.”

 

“That was an eye opener for me and challenged all I was brought up to believe that if you prove your fidelity again and again she’ll love you for it.  Marcial felt the biggest crime a man could commit wasn’t infidelity...It was boring his woman.  He said women would forgive men for being unfaithful…but leave a man if they became bored of him.  What he did to that poor girl seems cruel but he’s right about women wanting a man other women find attractive.”

 

“Okay Michael.  Now it’s even clearer why you put such an importance on getting all aspects of your life in order before you bother dating.  When a man’s dating, it’s easy for him to put up a façade or an image for the girl.  Once a man’s in a relationship, that façade comes down.  The girl sees him naked…so to speak.  Probably the most common lie has to be about money.  One time I was watching some reality show and a young, single girl made the comment that guys always have money problems after she starts dating them.  She was talking about men acting like they’re high rollers when she meets them and then as time goes on the truth comes out.  So you’re saying you’d better have your financial house in order before you start a relationship because money problems can’t be covered up with nice clothes for long…”

 

“…I’m thinking of other things women find attractive and relating them to being in a relationship.  Exactly how do I continue to play hard to get when I’m in a relationship?”

 

Michael smiled and said, “That’s a great question.  Playing hard to get in a relationship sounds contradictory but the application of the principle is more or less the same.  Consider a guy in a relationship whose entire life revolves around his woman.  He’s clingy.  He smothers her with attention and seems totally dependent on her.  He’s certainly not playing hard to get.  Now let’s consider a guy who’s life doesn’t entirely revolve around his woman.  He maintains a certain level of independence.  This could be about his job or about his friends or about his hobbies and sports, but he has a life outside of the relationship…outside her sphere of influence.  It shows her he can live without her and this will make her slightly insecure.  It makes her want to hold on to him.”

 

I completed Michael’s thought, “…And it gives that girl the space she needs.  It keeps the relationship healthy.”  We were ready to go now.  We’d eaten as many chicken wings as we could and we both had things to do at home.  Walking to our cars, I asked Michael about Stephanie and the relationship.  “We talked about relationships in general and we never talked specifically about you and Stephanie.

 

“Actually our discussion today about relationships in general was really helpful for me because it helps to view a relationship unemotionally.  It helps to looks at the pros and cons…the responsibilities and the benefits…and separate those from your feelings about the girl.  Stephanie is a total sweetheart but I’m trying to stay objective…So, I’m still thinking about it.”  Now Michael gave me a grin and said, “I’m playing hard to get.”

 

*************************

 

Friday, Michael and I got together for lunch.  We met at our favorite spot which was close for both of us.  Michael asked me where I was taking Kim that night.  “I’m taking her to that Thai restaurant you went to with Stephanie, Typhoon.  It’s a nice restaurant and after we eat there are options nearby to have desert or a drink or whatever we feel like.  I haven’t seen her since Monday.  She said she was busy all week and wanted to go out tonight…And that was fine for me.  I had a lot of things to catch up on.”

Then I asked Michael what was new with Stephanie and he said, “I thought more about the conversation we had about relationships.  I decided I need to listen to my own advice.  I think I read somewhere casual dates are for getting to know someone.  Formal dates are for the relationship.  Most people make the mistake of doing the opposite.  Men have formal dates when they’re getting to know someone and then once in the relationship only go on casual dates.  You have to spice up a relationship.  I think there are a lot of wives out there who’d love to go out on a real date.  They’d love to get flowers, be asked out, the door held open and have a special night.  Women want to dress up and feel like Cinderella once in a while.”

 

“My relationship with Stephanie is healthy so I want to keep it that way.  Anyway, Stephanie has Thursdays off so I asked her if she wanted to go to a concert.  Well, she about flipped she was so excited.  I dressed nicely but she outdid herself.  She looked beautiful and we had a great time.  We went to a nice restaurant before and then to the concert.  It was a Brazilian singer, CeU.  She was fabulous.  Stephanie loved her and loved the evening.  When I took her home she begged me to stay with her.  She promised she’d wake me up early so I could get home and be ready for work.”

 

“It’s good to get out of the routine and be a bit unpredictable.  Stephanie didn’t expect that concert and that made it all the better.  I’m going to try to use my imagination a few times a month.  It’s fun to try a new restaurant or go on a hike and take pictures.  Then there’s the weekend get-away and spend the night.  It’s all part of the anti-boredom plan.  Every relationship begins with the excitement of something new and that excitement will wear off so you need to replace it with the excitement of doing different things.”

 

It was time to get back to work now and as we walked out Michael said, “Okay, have fun with Kim tonight.  Give me a call this weekend when you have a chance.”  I asked what he was doing tonight and he said, “Stephanie works late but I think she has something cooked up for later…I expect our date last night will pay dividends all weekend.”  Michael smiled and we headed back to work.
